title: AI Assistant
subtitle: Your manuscript's editorial partner
emptyState.heading: See your story through an editor's eyes
emptyState.description: Editorial Review is designed for completed first drafts. It analyzes your entire manuscript across eight editorial dimensions and is token-intensive. For ongoing feedback while writing, use Chapter Analysis instead.
emptyState.features.title: WHAT EDITORIAL REVIEW COVERS
emptyState.features.bigPicture.title: The big picture
emptyState.features.bigPicture.descripti: Plot structure, thematic depth, and whether your story lands the way you intended.
emptyState.features.characters.title: Character & voice
emptyState.features.characters.descripti: Arc consistency, distinct voices, and the emotional truth of your cast.
emptyState.features.pacing.title: Rhythm & pacing
emptyState.features.pacing.description: Where the story breathes, where it rushes, and where readers might lose the thread.
emptyState.features.prose.title: Prose & craft
emptyState.features.prose.description: Line-level style, scene construction, and the small choices that shape how it reads.
confirm.title: Start Editorial Review?
confirm.description: This will analyze your entire manuscript. Editorial Review works best on completed first drafts. Continue?
report.editedChaptersHint_one: You've edited {{count}} chapter since the last review
report.editedChaptersHint_other: You've edited {{count}} chapters since the last review
failed.title: Editorial Review Interrupted
failed.progressKept: Your progress is saved. Continuing picks up right where the review left off — it won't start over.
failed.reasons.rate_limited: Your AI provider is receiving too many requests right now. This happens from time to time and has nothing to do with your manuscript. Wait a moment, then continue.
failed.reasons.overloaded: Your AI provider is temporarily overloaded. This usually clears up within a few minutes.
failed.reasons.insufficient_credits: Your AI provider account is out of credits or has reached its usage limit. Top up your account, then continue.
failed.reasons.invalid_key: Your AI provider rejected the API key. Check the key in the AI settings, then continue.
failed.reasons.no_provider: No AI provider is set up. Add one in the AI settings, then continue.
failed.reasons.no_content: There was no chapter text to review. Make sure your chapters have content, then continue.
failed.reasons.timeout: The review stopped unexpectedly. This can happen when a request takes too long or the app closes while a review is running.
failed.reasons.unknown: Something unexpected went wrong while talking to your AI provider.
experimentalAlert: This is an experimental feature. Results may vary in quality and accuracy.
preEditorial.heading: Pre-Editorial Assessment
preEditorial.description: This manuscript needs foundational work before a full editorial review would be useful. Focus on the areas below first, then run a new review.
panel.title: Editor's Note
panel.emptyChapter: No editor's note for this chapter
